name: Machakos Town Stormwater Plan
blocking_factor: Budget absorption and design revisions after 2019 floods
notes: Design revised twice after each major flood exposed new vulnerabilities. Currently in third design iteration. Procurement not commenced.

name: Mwania River Riparian Enforcement
blocking_factor: Dense peri-urban settlement on riparian land
notes: Buffer mapped. Settlement growth 2015-2023 within buffer is documented. No enforcement action. County planning approvals not cross-referenced with flood risk map.

name: Athi-Machakos Flash Flood Early Warning
blocking_factor: Machakos terrain (rocky hillsides) produces rapid runoff — short warning window
notes: 4 gauges operational. Maximum 90-minute warning for Machakos Town flash floods. Sub-chief alert chain inadequate for 90-minute window.

name: Machakos Hillside Stabilisation
blocking_factor: County budget allocation not approved by county assembly
notes: Design for gabion and reforestation programme complete. County assembly rejected allocation 2021 and 2022.
